question: Can a single fully-funded XRPUSDT equal-quantity spot-long/perpetual-short continuous carry preserve positive post-cost, post-capital-hurdle returns in a fresh post-parent period while reducing the parent basket from six legs to two?
relationship_to_prior_work: Operational-simplification follow-up to supported DOGE/XRP/ADA basket. All parent data through 2025-08 are exposed context and are not counted as fresh evidence.
position: equal XRP quantity long Binance spot and short Binance USD-M perpetual continuously
capital: spot purchase plus equal futures guarantee margin; no leverage credit
support_gate: data PASS; stress total and post-4%-hurdle returns >0; both 2025 and 2026 slices positive; max drawdown >-5%; funding PnL > absolute basis PnL; 8h block-bootstrap 95% lower mean >0
large_data_policy: Git-external checksum-verified public spot/perpetual 8h archives plus public settled funding history; manifest retained in research
